title: amaranthaceae
intro: The rank of Amaranthaceae is a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomic grouping that includes approximately 100 genera and over 2,000 species of plants, commonly known as amaranths and pigweeds. These plants are primarily found in tropical, subtropical, and temperate regions around the world and are known for their distinctive, often brightly colored flowers. The Amaranthaceae family is characterized by its diverse range of growth habits, from annuals to perennials, and its ability to thrive in various environments.
